text:
Once upon a time, there was a peculiar old owl named Oddwy strongholds at the edge of Whispering Woods. Oddwy was renowned not just for his remarkable memory but also his habit of predicting obscure historical events. One morning, he hooted softly to himself, thinking.

"It seems the year 2047 will witness the founding of a significant peace treaty between two former bitter enemies. They'll call one city Elderglen," he muttered to himself, preening a feather.

That afternoon, a flock of young golden eagles swooped down toward Oddwy. They had heard about his prophecy.

"You old wise owl!" one exclaimed. "Do you know what city it'll be?"

Oddwy hooted thoughtfully.

"Eldberg. Because of a wise old owl?"

"Exactly," they said in unison. "You're a clockmaker. You tell time?"

"More than time," Oddwy replied with a knowing hoot. "I tell stories."

He paused
